description_long: This object is a shotgun with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a full wooden stock and a black metal barrel. The stock is ergonomically shaped, with a smooth, polished wood finish and a slightly curved butt for shoulder support. The barrel is cylindrical and matte black, with a prominent front sight and a simple, functional trigger guard. The receiver and action area are compact, with visible screws and mechanical details, and the trigger is housed within a rounded metal guard. The fore-end appears to be integrated with the barrel, lacking any visible pump or lever mechanism. The overall appearance suggests a single-barrel, break-action or semi-automatic configuration, suitable for practical use in urban environments.
description: A sturdy shotgun with a full wooden stock, black metal barrel, and a rounded trigger guard, designed for practical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full wooden stock, black barrel, trigger, and the prominent front sight.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and action area.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metal guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
